title: ANC - Switch from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode
scenario: Transparency Mode switches OFF and its sub-setting is greyed out when ANC Mode is turned ON, with ANC retaining its previously selected value
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly audio device.
Go to Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency Mode.
Ensure Transparency Mode is currently ON and set to a previously selected value (e.g., Environment or Speech).
Tap the ANC toggle to turn ANC ON.
Observe the Transparency Mode toggle and its selected value after ANC is turned ON.
expected: Transparency Mode switches OFF automatically. The previously selected Transparency Mode value (Environment or Speech) is greyed out/disabled. ANC is set to ON with its previously selected value.
